title: Snap Introduces Shared Stories Feature For Snapchatters
text: Snap introduces a Shared Stories feature, which is a new iteration of Custom Stories. The feature is expected to help Snapchatters build a community around the content they love.

title: PROFESSIONAL FIGHTERS LEAGUE ANNOUNCES PARTNERSHIP WITH LIVE NATION TO EXPAND INTERNATIONAL PRESENCE
text: TWO MAJOR 2022 PFL PLAYOFF EVENTS TO BE HOSTED IN THE UNITED KINGDOM THIS AUGUST Back-To-Back MMA Events to be held in  Cardiff on Saturday, August 13 and London Saturday, August 20 Ticket Pre-Sale Monday, July 4 Tickets Available Wednesday, July 6  UK Press Conference assets NEW YORK , May 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Professional Fighters League, the fastest growing and most innovative sports league, today announced two major back-to-back 2022 Playoffs will be hosted in Cardiff and London this summer in partnership with Live Nation, the world's largest music and entertainment promoter.  MMA fans in the United Kingdom for the first time ever will experience the greatest fighters on the planet compete in the PFL's win-and-advance season format.

title: What's Happening With Live Nation Stock?
text: Live Nation Entertainment stock (NYSE: LYV) has declined by around 16% over the last month (around 21 trading days), underperforming the broader S&P 500 which remains down by about 11% over the same period.

title: SNAP Introduces New AR Lenses to Electric Daisy Carnival
text: In partnership with Live Nation, Snap (SNAP) introduces four new AR lenses at the Electric Daisy Carnival, Las Vegas.

title: Live Nation Should Be Broken Up, Says New Jersey Congressman, Citing Safety Record
text: Concert promotion giant Live Nation should be broken up, according to New Jersey Democratic Congressman Bill Pascrell, who claims its safety record is disturbing. Pascrell cited the recent attack on comedian Dave Chappelle and the Travis Scott Astroworld tragedy that resulted in the death of 10 people and numerous inuries. “About 200 deaths and 750...

title: Live Nation (LYV) Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Lag
text: Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) first-quarter 2022 results benefit from pent-up demand for live events and robust ticket sales.

title: Live Nation revenue jumps as concert ticket sales rebound
text: Concert promoter and venue operator Live Nation said it logged its “best first quarter ever,” thanks to a resurgence in concert going, which juiced sales at its Ticketmaster division. Ticket sales giant, Ticketmaster recorded its second highest gross transaction volume in its history with an estimated 111,292 in the three months ended March 31.

title: Live Nation Earnings Show 'Remarkable' Ticket Demand. Wall Street Likes What It Sees.
text: The company's latest earnings report illustrated growing demand for concert tickets.

title: CHEF TIM LOVE AND LIVE NATION REVEAL OPENING SERIES OF SHOWS FOR NEW TANNAHILL'S TAVERN & MUSIC HALL
text: New Music Venue Inside of Tannahill's Set To Officially Open October 1  WATCH CONCERT LINEUP REVEAL VIDEO HERE FORT WORTH, Texas , May 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, Chef Tim Love and Live Nation revealed the opening series of live performances featuring renowned touring acts and local artists across a wide variety of genres, as well as the official opening date for the music hall inside of Tannahill's. A full list of shows that were just announced can be found below.

title: Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. (LYV) CEO Michael Rapino on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. (NYSE:LYV ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 5, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Michael Rapino - President and CEO Joe Berchtold - CFO Conference Call Participants David Karnovsky - JPMorgan Stephen Laszczyk - Goldman Sachs Brandon Ross - LightShed Partners Stephen Glagola - Cowen David Katz - Jefferies Benjamin Swinburne - Morgan Stanley Ryan Sundby - William Blair Matthew Hargan - Benchmark Barton Crockett - Rosenblatt Securities Operator Good day, everyone. My name is Hector and I will be your conference operator on today's call.

title: Live Nation Entertainment Reports First Quarter 2022 Results
text: Q1 Highlights: Company Delivers Best First Quarter Ever Operating Income of $27 Million and AOI of $209 Million Ticketmaster Delivers Another Record Quarter - Operating Income Up 3x, AOI Up 2x, Transacted GTV Up 39% (vs Q1 2019) Ticketmaster Growing Client Base - 7 Million Net New Tickets Added Sponsorship Operating Income Up 83% and AOI Up 75% (vs Q1 2019) OCESA Financial Performance At 2019 Levels 2022 Outlook: Leading Indicators Point to Record Year Ahead 70 Million Tickets Sold for 2022 Concerts, On Track for Double-Digit Fan Growth This Year (vs 2019) Concert Bookings Up 44% Through Late April (vs 2019) $3.5 Billion in Event Related Deferred Revenue, Up Nearly 2x (vs Q1 2019) Fan Demand for Best Seats Drives Concert Ticket Pricing Up Double-Digits (vs 2019), While Entry Level Tickets Average Under $35 Fan Base at Operated Venues Growing - 20 New Venues in 2022 Pipeline, 38 New Festivals Over 90% of Planned Sponsorship Net Revenue for 2022 Committed LOS ANGELES , May 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. (NYSE: LYV) today released financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2022. Momentum has picked up for all of our businesses over the course of the first quarter, and as a result, we delivered financial performance that greatly surpassed our previous expectations, with operating income of $27 million and AOI of $209 million.

title: Live Nation (LYV) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Live Nation Entertainment's (LYV) first-quarter 2021 top line is likely to reflect benefits from pent-up demand for live events and robust ticket sales.
